case.title: ST PAUL, M & M R CO v. WENZEL

opinion.h1: ST PAUL, M & M R CO v. WENZEL, 139 U.S. 23 (1891)
opinion.h2: ST. PAUL, M. & M. RY. CO. v. WENZEL.
opinion.p: S. J. R. McMillan, for appellee.
This case involves the same question decided in Railway Co. v. Greenalgh, ante, 395, and upon the authority of that case the decree will be affirmed.
